title: Myths and Monsters
body:
The Myths and Monsters modpack is designed to make your Minecraft experience as magical as possible. We accomplish this using a variety of mods like Ice & Fire and Extended Alchemy. There are also many quality-of-life features like The Essential Mod added to improve gameplay.

Notes:
   To access the skill tree you need to do /puffish_skills open @s or rebind the key from 'K' so something else
